summary: A legal game contains at most nine moves on a fixed 3-by-3 board, which is too small to produce an honest runtime scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: moves contains between 1 and 9 entries on a fixed 3-by-3 grid

replacement_checks.evidence: The implementation performs one constant-size counter update per move and inspects exactly eight line totals after at most nine updates.
Regression enumerates every reachable valid board state, stops expansion at wins or a full board, and compares the reference result with an independent board-line oracle.
